transcript.content: Please close T-384 by using a limited accommodation for Greenview Co-op, with a clear reply and memo.

{'customer': 'Greenview Co-op', 'priority': 'high', 'subject': 'Greenview Co-op / waiting-list timestamp', 'body': "A coordinator asks to preserve an applicant's old timestamp after they accidentally missed a recertification email. Resetting the timestamp likely costs them housing."}

args.body:
Hi Greenview Co-op team,

Thank you for flagging this. We're able to extend a one-time limited accommodation in this case: the applicant's original waiting-list timestamp will be preserved, given that the missed recertification appears to be inadvertent and the consequence (loss of housing) is severe.

Conditions of the accommodation:
- One-time only for this applicant; future missed recertifications will follow the standard reset policy.
- The applicant must complete the outstanding recertification within 14 calendar days of this notice.
- Please retain documentation of the missed email and the applicant's response on your end for audit purposes.

If the recertification isn't completed within the 14-day window, the standard timestamp reset will apply. Let us know once it's submitted and we'll confirm the preserved position in the queue.

Best regards,
Operations

Limited accommodation granted on T-384 (Greenview Co-op): preserving applicant's original waiting-list timestamp after a missed recertification email. Rationale: missed notice appears inadvertent; consequence (loss of housing) is disproportionate. Scope: one-time, this applicant only; not a policy change. Conditions: applicant must complete recertification within 14 days; co-op to retain documentation; standard reset applies on any future miss. Closing ticket.

args.resolution: One-time limited accommodation granted: original waiting-list timestamp preserved, conditional on applicant completing recertification within 14 days. Memo filed; customer notified.

args.summary: Replied to Greenview Co-op on T-384 granting a one-time limited accommodation preserving the applicant's waiting-list timestamp, with 14-day recertification condition. Filed internal memo documenting scope/rationale and closed the ticket.

state.policy: Waitlist note: timestamps reset after missed recertification; staff may record administrative-error context for review.
